overall.description: First-person exploration of a sci-fi industrial depository facility at night. The player approaches the Varuun Depository entrance, enters through heavy doors, and explores the interior storage area with neon and fluorescent lighting, encountering a janitor NPC mopping the floor. The environment features metallic surfaces, stacked containers, and industrial equipment typical of a video game setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi depository entrance with neon signage

events.description: approaching the entrance doors of the Varuun Depository

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete steps toward the large metal entrance doors of the depository

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the entrance who moves out of view as camera approaches

entered.detail: illuminated yellow sign with black text reading VARUUN DEPOSITORY mounted above the entrance
large dark metal double doors with vertical windows and metallic frames
tall cylindrical green container with horizontal ridges sitting on the platform
wide concrete steps with yellow safety stripes leading up to the entrance
bright circular white light fixture mounted on the wall left of the door
vertical red and orange neon light strips visible in the background corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens outside the Varuun Depository at night, with the camera approaching the entrance. A guard stands to the right near the steps. The entrance features prominent yellow signage, heavy metal doors, and industrial lighting. The camera moves steadily forward up the steps toward the doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial depository interior with service counter and maintenance area

events.description: passing through the entrance doors into the interior of the depository
janitor begins mopping the floor near the service counter
camera pans upward to examine the ceiling and overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: entering the depository interior and observing the janitor mopping the floor around the service counter area

notable_agents.action: janitor mopping the floor with a long-handled mop, moving around the counter and looking up occasionally

entered.detail: long curved counter with teal countertop and metallic base featuring yellow accent lighting
long linear fluorescent light fixtures suspended from the industrial ceiling
rectangular metallic ventilation units mounted on the left wall
stacked black and white plastic storage containers on the floor
metal shelving units holding various equipment and boxes
damaged ceiling panels with exposed insulation and wiring

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the depository interior, revealing a service counter and industrial storage area. A janitor is mopping the floor near the counter. The space features fluorescent lighting, ventilation units, and storage crates. The camera moves around the area, briefly looking up at the damaged ceiling panels before continuing to explore.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with metal shelving and equipment

events.description: moving away from the service counter toward the back storage areas
entering area with distinct yellow ambient wall lighting
turning back toward the entrance doors to exit

agents.ego_description: exploring the back storage areas, examining shelves and industrial equipment, then returning toward the entrance

entered.detail: tall yellow-framed metal shelving units holding various containers and equipment
stacked teal-colored plastic storage boxes with white lids
large equipment including a spherical metallic device on a black stand
elevated platform with metal grate flooring and support beams
horizontal yellow light fixtures mounted on the back wall
wall-mounted computer terminal with screen and interface
simple metal bench against the right wall near the exit
wall panel with horizontal black and yellow stripes near the exit
thick black cables running across the floor near the exit

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the deeper storage areas of the depository, passing metal shelving units, teal storage containers, and industrial machinery including a spherical device. The lighting shifts to yellow ambient tones in the back area. The camera then turns and moves back toward the entrance, showing the exit doors from inside, a wall terminal, and striped safety markings near the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dark exterior of an industrial facility into its brightly lit, cluttered interior. It begins at night outside the Varuun Depository, moving steadily up the steps past a guard and under yellow signage toward the heavy metal doors. As the camera crosses the threshold, the scene opens into a fluorescently lit service area where a janitor mops the floor near storage crates and damaged ceiling panels. The movement then pushes deeper into the depository, passing teal containers and a spherical industrial device as the lighting shifts to warm yellow ambient tones. Finally, the camera turns back toward the entrance, gliding past a wall terminal and striped safety markings to reveal the exit doors from the inside.
